transcript:
Hello everybody. So my name is Alex Dolesky. What we do is create the spot market and by extension the datasets for uranium trading. So, the only way to accomplish something like this in terms of integrating a currently full OTC bilateral trade ecosystem is getting buy-in from the storage settlement facilities. With uranium, it's obviously highly regulated, so we have our accounts with the only storage and enrichment facility in the continental U.S. That is for the actual execution of physical settlement of physical uranium.

Furthermore, we're integrated with Chainlink on the Proof of Reserves front to open up margin markets for the first time for this commodity, and as well regulated custody with Anchorage Digital and pieces of Cube's technologies trading stack to actually inform proper liquid order books.

The problem with uranium is when you think about the evolution of most commodities—the first NYMEX contract for oil traded in 1983, natural gas was only financialized in the mid-90s, and then coal only in the mid-2000s. The fact with uranium today is it's evolved sort of as the ugly duckling next to the overall commodities complex. What this means is that trade today is purely bilateral: phone calls, emails, physical settlement. What our platform enables is the existing institutional traders to execute physical settlement seamlessly in an automated process, as well as actually execute cash trading.

So, we work with both physical suppliers—99% of our life is spent with the institutional commodities traders who can route trades from their existing order management systems directly to our market to cash settle—as well as the physical guys to actually take physical settlement of the underlying uranium.

How it really works is that when you want to physically settle, our entire process is automated directly with the conversion facilities themselves. So if one wants to take delivery of the underlying commodity, they can, or if they want to issue digital assets against that. Why this is very important is that the integral part of every functioning commodity market is the ability to physically settle the underlying asset. Without this, the cash traders have no trust in the integrity of your market, and therefore, it doesn't quite work.

So, we've got a quick little demo of what this actually looks like... Basically, this is just the home screen of the dashboard that the institutional physical guys use. What you see is the Settlement Account, which is what is connected to the actual conversion facilities—this is for the transfer, issuance, and settlement of the underlying uranium. The Trading Account is what is connected to the actual trading interface. This is structured as a hybrid exchange such that we never custody client assets; thanks to our partnership with Cube Exchange, we provide full lit order books. So for the first time, uranium traders in the existing market can actually see order book depth, how the actual flow process works, and be able to trade strategies as they know it from traditional markets.

So, by way of example, today if I wanted to trade uranium, instead of actually hitting a market like I would on the CME, the LME, things of this nature, I would actually make phone calls, send emails, and negotiate with brokers themselves. The time to actually execute a trade from first call to settlement is about two, three weeks, and a minimum round lot size is 100,000 pounds—that's $8 million notional at current spot prices.

So, here you see the actual redemption process. The institution simply selects which conversion facility they want to take delivery of the underlying to... Once the institution selects this, they elect how many pounds of uranium they want to receive, i.e., how many tokens. Uranium trades in pounds the same way gold trades in ounces, always a one-to-one.

And effectively, in the current process flow, what would happen is I would get physical sales purchase paperwork from the person I'm buying the physical uranium from. I would have my lawyer double-check it, I would sign it, send that to the converter facility to then execute the actual transfer. This process actually automates the entire flow whereby an institution clicks a few times; they're automatically requesting and executing a physical settlement to their conversion facility.

The way this really works on-chain is that, thanks to Chainlink and the Proof of Reserves oracle, what happens here is that the tokens in the institution's account, when they request for a settlement, those are frozen. When we get the receipt back from the conversion facility that the trade has been settled—which means uranium has left our account, landed in theirs—those tokens are now burned from the supply via Chainlink, via the network firm and our auditors.

So, effectively for the first time, institutions can properly trade uranium, all settled on Solana. However, the entire experience of crypto is abstracted away for them. As you can imagine, uranium traders in the real world are not necessarily crypto-friendly. So, that's what we've done. And if anybody wants an actual piece of uranium, you can scan that and we'll send you an actual piece of uranium. Thank you very much.

# Jupiter Unveils JupUSD and a New Era of Onchain Finance at Breakpoint
JupUSD anchors Jupiter’s push toward integrated, compliant, and institutional-grade onchain finance on Solana
![Yasmin Werner](https://coincentral.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/cropped-cropped-CCIcon-32x32.png)By[Yasmin Werner](https://coincentral.com/author/yasmin/)December 12, 2025**3 Mins Read
![](https://coincentral.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/jupiter.jpg "Jupiter Unveils JupUSD and a New Era of Onchain Finance at Breakpoint")
## TLDR
* JupUSD becomes Jupiter’s core stablecoin across swaps, lending, perps, and strategies
* Jupiter Lend exits beta, boosting stablecoin efficiency with higher LTVs and lower penalties
* JupUSD shifts from standalone asset to infrastructure powering Solana-native DeFi
* KRW-pegged stablecoin signals Solana’s growing focus on regulated, institutional finance
* New data, verification, and trading tools support scalable, professional onchain markets
Jupiter announced a coordinated expansion of onchain finance capabilities at Breakpoint, centered on JupUSD and integrated infrastructure upgrades. The update combines stablecoins, lending, data, and trading into a single Solana-native stack. As a result, JupUSD anchors a broader push toward compliant, scalable, and professional onchain finance.
## JupUSD Expands Stablecoin Utility Across Jupiter
[Jupiter](https://coincentral.com/jupiter-targets-full-launch-of-prediction-market-platform-before-2026/)introduced JupUSD as a deeply integrated stablecoin designed to operate across its full product suite. The platform embedded JupUSD into swaps, perpetuals, lending, and automated strategies. Consequently, JupUSD supports consistent liquidity while sharing platform economics with active users.
JupUSD connects stable value with execution layers already processing billions in volume on Solana. Therefore, the design enables protocol-level coordination instead of isolated stablecoin usage. JupUSD also supports rewards during holding periods across multiple onchain features.
The rollout positions JupUSD as infrastructure rather than a standalone asset. Jupiter aligned issuance, routing, and incentives to strengthen onchain activity. As a result, JupUSD appears across web, mobile, and API surfaces as a default settlement asset.
Jupiter paired JupUSD with upgrades to lending and yield systems supporting stable demand. Jupiter Lend exited beta after rapid supply growth and released open source code. This environment allows JupUSD liquidity to move efficiently across borrowing, trading, and structured strategies.
Jupiter Lend uses tick-based liquidity built with Fluid for efficient liquidations. Consequently, the protocol offers higher loan ratios and lower penalties than comparable markets. These conditions

* * * # Jupiter Unveils JupUSD Stablecoin and Major DeFi Upgrades at Solana Breakpoint 2025
Story Highlights
* Jupiter launches JupUSD stablecoin & 8 major upgrades, boosting Solana DeFi with lending, trading tools, rewards & ecosystem safety.
* Solana’s top DEX aggregator Jupiter unveils JupUSD, open-source lending, new Terminal & $1M rewards to fuel DeFi growth.
Jupiter, the top[decentralized exchange](https://coinpedia.org/decentralized-exchange/)(DEX) aggregator on Solana, has unveiled a comprehensive suite of eight major upgrades at Solana Breakpoint 2025, designed to transform the platform into a full-scale DeFi hub. The primary goals of these upgrades are to simplify DeFi, improve safety, and complete Jupiter’s offerings beyond just token swaps.
[Advertisement](https://coinpedia.org/advertising/)[](https://bit.ly/4qIkEoO)
## **JupUSD Brings a Native Stablecoin**
The biggest[announcement](https://x.com/JupiterExchange/status/1999154800982729175?s=20)is JupUSD, a new dollar-backed[stablecoin](https://coinpedia.org/beginners-guide/what-are-stablecoins/)built with Ethena. Unlike most stablecoins that live separately from apps, JupUSD is designed to work directly inside Jupiter’s products. Users will be able to use it while setting up DCA strategies, placing limit orders, and taking part in prediction markets, while also earning rewards. Jupiter believes that owning both the stablecoin and the platform allows funds to move more smoothly across swaps, perpetual trades, and lending. JupUSD is set to launch next week and will tap into the large trading volumes already

# JPMorgan Partners with Solana for Galaxy Digital’s Tokenized Debt Deal
JPMorgan selects Solana for Galaxy Digital’s tokenized debt deal, marking a milestone in blockchain-based financial products.
![Kelvin Munene](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/d4ea74978aea7ee299447dc24a59aa1dac1fdc2a31a46fbf19da2cdce3d322bd?s=32&r=g)By[Kelvin Munene](https://coincentral.com/author/kelvin/)December 12, 2025**4 Mins Read
![](https://coincentral.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/jpmorgan.jpg "JPMorgan Partners with Solana for Galaxy Digital’s Tokenized Debt Deal")
## TLDR
* JPMorgan launches USCP, a tokenized corporate debt product built on Solana.
* Both issuance andredemptionproceeds for the deal are paid in USDC stablecoin.
* Coinbase and Franklin Templeton lead as investors in Galaxy’s debt token.
* The deal marks one of the first U.S. debt issuances executed on a public blockchain.
JPMorgan has[initiated](https://x.com/CoinMarketCap/status/1999287108087800016?s=20)a groundbreaking tokenized debt transaction, selecting Solana as the blockchain platform for Galaxy Digital’s commercial paper offering. This deal highlights the growing institutional interest in digital assets and blockchain technology for financial services. The tokenized debt instrument, called USCP, represents a significant step in bridging traditional finance with emerging blockchain infrastructure.
Galaxy Digital, a firm known for its ventures in blockchain-based financial products, is using this transaction to introduce its first U.S. commercial paper issuance. The deal also marks the debut of a tokenized debt offering, a format that facilitates broader participation from institutional investors.[JPMorgan’s](https://coincentral.com/jpmorgan-defends-against-claims-of-politically-motivated-debanking/)involvement underscores the bank’s increasing role in the digital asset space.
### **USDC Stablecoin Powers the Transaction**
Both the issuance and redemption of the USCP debt tokens will be processed using Circle’s[USDC](https://coincentral.com/stripe-enters-crypto-space-with-usdc-stablecoin-payments/)stablecoin. This decision emphasizes the growing role of stablecoins in facilitating large financial transactions and providing liquidity in the digital asset space. Using USDC ensures that the transaction remains stable and predictable, an essential feature for institutional investors managing large sums of money.
The decision to use Solana for this deal is noteworthy. Known for its fast transaction speeds and lower fees compared to other blockchains, Solana offers a scalable infrastructure suitable for financial markets. The combination of Solana’s blockchain and USDC’s stability presents an attractive model for future tokenized debt offerings.
### **Institutional Inv

tags.impact_reason: Uranium Digital is an interesting integration of real-world assets and commodities trading on Solana, but its initial scope seems limited to institutional traders and physical settlement, with Chainlink integration for Proof of Reserves.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a glowing uranium crystal inside a futuristic containment unit as the Semantic Anchor. This visually represents the core story: a raw, powerful, and highly regulated Real World Asset (Uranium) being secured, digitized, and made accessible through modern technology (the on-chain market). For the homepage text, I integrated 'RWA' as a holographic label on the containment unit. This is diegetic, high-impact, and instantly communicates the primary theme of tokenizing Real World Assets, which is central to the article.
visual_idea.description: A medium shot of a raw, crystalline chunk of uranium glowing with an intense, internal green light. It's suspended inside a sophisticated, dark metal and glass containment vault. Volumetric light shafts pierce the clinical darkness of the surrounding laboratory. In the background, out-of-focus server racks emit faint purple and green status lights, hinting at the Solana blockchain infrastructure. A subtle, holographic diagnostic display on the vault's glass surface projects the letters 'RWA', integrating the text diegetically into the high-security environment.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A medium shot of a raw, multi-faceted crystalline chunk of uranium, its rough surface shimmering like a precious gem, intensely glowing with an internal, vibrant green light. The uranium is monumentally suspended within a sophisticated containment vault crafted from brushed obsidian metal, exhibiting a deep, dark sheen and intricate detailing, juxtaposed with thick, high-security glass. Dramatic volumetric light shafts pierce the clinical darkness of the surrounding high-tech laboratory, creating sharp contrasts and long shadows. In the deep background, subtly out-of-focus server racks emit faint, ethereal purple and green status lights, hinting at the complex Solana blockchain infrastructure powering the facility. A subtle, ethereal holographic diagnostic display projects the letters 'RWA' directly onto the vault's reinforced glass surface, seamlessly integrating the text into the high-security environment. The composition is vertical (3:4 aspect ratio), emphasizing immense height and epic scale, with significant negative space above the vault, making the entire setup feel monumental. 8k, octane render, raytracing, physically based rendering (PBR), hyperrealistic, photoreal detail, cinematic contrast, hyper-detailed.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a glowing uranium crystal inside a futuristic containment unit as the Semantic Anchor. This visually represents the core story: a raw, powerful, and highly regulated Real World Asset (Uranium) being secured, digitized, and made accessible through modern technology (the on-chain market). For the homepage text, I integrated 'RWA' as a holographic label on the containment unit. visual_idea.description: A macro, top-down shot focusing on the intricate, glowing facets of the uranium crystal. The light from within creates complex caustic patterns on the polished black metal floor of the containment unit just below it. The frame is tightly cropped on the raw energy of the asset, contrasting the organic mineral structure with the precise, clean lines of the technology that encases it.

Volumetric light from within the crystal creates dramatic, complex caustic patterns on the highly polished brushed obsidian metal floor of the containment unit directly below it. The frame is tightly cropped, emphasizing the raw, vibrant energy of the asset and contrasting the organic mineral structure with the precise, clean lines of the advanced technology that encases it within a secure, vault-like environment. Perfectly symmetrical, centrally focused, tight macro framing filling the square 1:1 frame with rich textures and deep details. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, photorealistic, cinematic contrast, physically based rendering (PBR).

editorial.headline: Uranium Digital Launches Institutional Spot Market on Solana
editorial.standfirst: The platform modernizes the "ugly duckling" of commodities markets, replacing bilateral phone deals with on-chain settlement. Institutions can now trade uranium with liquid order books and automated physical delivery.
key_takeaways: Secured integration with the sole storage and enrichment facility in the continental U.S. for physical settlement.
Strategic infrastructure partnerships with **Chainlink** (Proof of Reserve), **Anchorage Digital** (Custody), and **Cube Exchange**.
Digitizes a market previously reliant on 3-week settlement cycles and $8 million minimum lot sizes.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
While oil and natural gas markets were financialized decades ago, uranium trading has remained stuck in the analog era. At Solana Breakpoint 2025, **Uranium Digital** founder Alex Dolesky unveiled a solution to this inefficiency: an institutional-grade spot market built on Solana. The platform addresses the "ugly duckling" of the commodities complex, where trade is currently conducted via bilateral phone calls and emails with settlement times dragging out to three weeks.

The infrastructure is designed specifically to meet the rigorous demands of institutional commodities traders. By leveraging **Cube Exchange**'s technology stack for a hybrid exchange model and **Anchorage Digital** for regulated custody, the platform provides full lit order books—a first for the uranium market. This allows traders to execute strategies familiar in traditional finance but previously impossible in the opaque, OTC-dominated nuclear fuel sector. Crucially, the crypto backend is entirely abstracted away, presenting users with a familiar dashboard rather than a complex Web3 interface.

The platform's most significant breakthrough is its automated physical settlement capability. **Uranium Digital** has secured accounts with the only storage and enrichment facility in the continental U.S., enabling a seamless bridge between digital tokens and physical isotopes. When an institution requests delivery, **Chainlink**'s Proof of Reserve oracle verifies the transaction, freezing the digital assets until the facility confirms the physical transfer, at which point the tokens are burned from the supply.

This launch represents a major step in Real World Asset (RWA) adoption, moving beyond simple tokenization to full market restructuring. By reducing the friction of the traditional 100,000-pound ($8 million) minimum lot sizes and automating compliance, **Uranium Digital** is not just putting uranium on a blockchain; it is creating the first liquid, transparent spot market for the fuel powering the global energy transition.
